title: cyperus graciliculmis
intro: Cyperus graciliculmis, also known as slender umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Cyperus graciliculmis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
